cases.input: Decompose this PRD into a hierarchical backlog. The PRD covers a customer portal with order tracking, payment history, and support ticket submission.
cases.context: Finalized PRD with 3 major capabilities, 50,000 customers, B2C portal, Fibonacci story point scale

cases.input: The PRD describes user-facing features but we also need to capture all infrastructure, security, and DevOps requirements as technical stories.
cases.context: PRD with functional requirements, Azure deployment, GDPR compliance needed, CI/CD pipeline required, no existing technical stories identified

cases.input: What are the 7 work item types in the backlog hierarchy and how does each map to PRD content?
cases.context: PRD with epics, functional requirements, risks identified, known blockers, tech debt items, infrastructure needs

cases.input: We decomposed the PRD and have 20 user stories but some don't have acceptance criteria yet. Is that acceptable?
cases.context: backlog-decompose quality rule: every story must have testable acceptance criteria, Given/When/Then format preferred

cases.input: After decomposing the PRD into backlog files, which exporter skill should we use if we want to push to Azure DevOps vs Linear vs GitHub Issues?
cases.context: Platform-neutral backlog files generated, team uses Azure DevOps with SAFe, alternative consideration for Linear
